notes: All 10 test cases pass across both scenarios. TestSourceField_RoundTrip, TestSourceField_AbsentInJSON, and TestSourceField_AbsentInJSON_WithPlan validate serialization. TestMigrateSourceTracking_DefaultsCentral, TestMigrateSourceTracking_InfersFromPlan (4 sub-tests: registry/embedded/local/unknown), TestMigrateSourceTracking_Idempotent, and TestMigrateSourceTracking_SkipsExisting validate migration. TestRecipeSourceFromProvider (4 sub-tests: registry/embedded/local/custom) validates source population. Full suite (go test ./...) has one pre-existing lint failure in internal/dashboard/dashboard_test.go (SA5011 staticcheck, unrelated to issue #2). All packages relevant to source tracking pass cleanly.
